normalization.notes: Store Malayalam text in NFC and preserve source forms. Analysis tooling may inspect consonant plus vowel-sign, chandrakkala, chillu, and conjunct sequences for akshara segmentation.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: independent vowels, consonant bases, dependent vowel signs, anusvara, chandrakkala, chillus, and selected conjunct frames
segmentation.notes: Malayalam is an abugida. Count visible aksharas and teachable parts separately because vowel signs, inherent vowel handling, chandrakkala, chillus, conjuncts, and font shaping affect decoding.
